message:
test(pt-core): extend shadow and agent config coverage with 79 new inline tests (process_triage-aii.7)

shadow.rs: 3→44 tests (+41) covering action_to_recommendation, confidence_score,
compute_identity_hash, build_evidence_event, load/persist_pending, ShadowRecorder
with tempdir (record_candidate, flush, pid reuse, miss count reset).

agent_init/config.rs: 3→41 tests (+38) covering generate_config for all 5 agent
types, ConfigError display, write_json_config, create_backup, configure_claude_code/
codex/cursor/copilot/windsurf with tempdir (fresh, existing, idempotent, dry run,
invalid config repair, backup creation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
